## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Unit tests with ≥ 80% coverage
- [ ] Integration test if external service is involved
- [ ] Exported from `src/index.ts` barrel
- [ ] Entry in `README.md`
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated
